items.title: Interaction of the mitochondrial calcium/proton exchanger TMBIM5 with MICU1
items.author: Axel Methner
items.content: Genetic and biochemical evidence reveals a functional interaction between mitochondrial proteins TMBIM5 and MICU1.

items.title: Cholinergic network modulation in disinhibited eating behavior
items.author: Osama Sabri
items.content: Simultaneous PET-MRI measurements provide fundamental insights into the modulation of neural networks mediated by nicotinic acetylcholine receptors in human obesity as a putative biological mechanism for future weight loss interventions.

items.title: Cancer-associated fibroblasts shape the formation of budding cancer cells at the invasive front of human colorectal cancer
items.author: Lasse S. Kristensen
items.content: Single-cell spatial transcriptomics reveals that CAFs at the invasive front of colorectal tumors induce pro-invasive changes in budding cancer cells, characterized by an 11-gene signature linked to metastasis and poor prognosis.

items.title: Plasticity of symbiotroph-saprotroph lifestyles of Piloderma croceum associated with Quercus robur L.
items.author: Sylvie Herrmann
items.content: Evidence is provided for plasticity between symbiotrophic and saprotrophic lifestyles of the ectomycorrhizal (EM) fungus Piloderma croceum associated with Quercus robur L., indicating a role for deadwood as an underestimated EM fungus propagule bank.

items.title: Author Correction: The ROS–FOXO pathway mediates broad-spectrum detoxification of acaricides in Tetranychus cinnabarinus
items.author: Lin He
items.content: Author Correction: The ROS–FOXO pathway mediates broad-spectrum detoxification of acaricides in

items.title: Causal contributions of left inferior and medial frontal cortex to semantic and executive control
items.author: Gesa Hartwigsen
items.content: Perturbing medial and left inferior frontal cortices with TMS differentiates semantic from domain-general executive control, with compensatory interactions revealing a flexible, interconnected cognitive control network.

items.title: Lead binds HIF-1α contributing to depression-like behaviour through modulating mitochondria-associated astrocyte ferroptosis
items.author: Yanshu Zhang
items.content: Lead exposure induces depression-like behaviour in mice via astrocyte ferroptosis. Pb binds HIF-1α, preventing degradation and promoting VDAC1- mediated mitochondrial dysfunction, revealing a novel HIF-1α/VDAC1 axis in Pb neurotoxicity.

items.title: Digging into the evolutionary history of the fungus-growing-ant symbiont, Escovopsis (Hypocreaceae)
items.author: Andre Rodrigues
items.content: Comprehensive analysis of Escovopsis fungi across the Americas traces its evolution, distribution, and adaptations, providing insights into their complex symbiotic relationship with ants.
